title: Quick Prawn Medley
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring succulent prawns, sautéed in garlic and herbs, served with a colorful medley of vegetables.
instructions: 1. Rinse the prawns under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
4. Add the prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until they turn pink and are cooked through.
5. Add the mixed vegetables to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until they are tender.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
